stemHtml: After a consignment of dangerous goods have been loaded into an aircraft, you notice that a package is damaged. This package:

options.a: May be transported by air, provided the content is inspected and found to be intact.
options.b: May only be transported by air if it does NOT contain radioactive material.
options.c: Shall be removed from the aircraft, under the Operator’s responsibility.
options.d: Shall be removed from the aircraft, under the shipper’s responsibility.
